claims.claimText: A postoperative recommendation is incomplete without patient population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context.

metadata.sourceNote: Human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Weight-bearing labels are not universal prescriptions; progression depends on construct stability, biology, procedure, soft tissues, and patient factors.

metadata.sourceNote: Weight-bearing recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Progressive loading should be governed by explicit clinical, functional, and imaging milestones rather than time alone.

metadata.sourceNote: Weight-bearing and time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Immobilization balances protection against stiffness, skin injury, deconditioning, and thromboembolic risk.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Persistent drainage, spreading erythema, dehiscence, fever, or increasing pain requires prompt wound and infection reassessment.

metadata.sourceNote: Human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Drain removal should use the procedure-specific plan, output trend, wound status, and attending preference.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Follow-up cadence should match the risk window for wound failure, loss of reduction, healing failure, and implant complications.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Surveillance imaging is interpreted against prior studies and the expected trajectory for the procedure and construct.

metadata.sourceNote: Human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Range-of-motion progression must respect tissue healing, repair security, fixation stability, and procedure-specific restrictions.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Return to work and sport should be criteria-based and account for task demands, symptoms, strength, motion, confidence, and reinjury risk.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: DVT prophylaxis agent and duration require patient-, procedure-, mobility-, and bleeding-risk stratification.

metadata.sourceNote: Medication-duration recommendation: attending review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Postoperative antibiotic duration depends on indication, contamination, cultures, source control, and institutional practice.

metadata.sourceNote: Medication-duration recommendation: attending review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Heterotopic ossification prophylaxis is reserved for context-specific risk and must consider medication or radiation harms.

metadata.sourceNote: Medication-duration recommendation: attending review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Failure of fracture healing progression prompts reassessment of mechanics, biology, infection, host factors, and adherence.

metadata.sourceNote: Attending review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Dynamization is a construct- and fracture-specific intervention, not a routine response to every slow-healing fracture.

metadata.sourceNote: Weight-bearing/construct recommendation: attending review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: ACL rehabilitation progression integrates effusion control, motion, strength, movement quality, and graft/meniscus constraints.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Rotator cuff progression varies with tear size, tissue quality, repair security, concomitant procedures, and patient factors.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: THA precautions vary with approach, stability, soft-tissue repair, component position, and patient risk.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Fusion surveillance and activity progression account for symptoms, neurologic status, imaging, construct, bone health, and work demands.

metadata.sourceNote: Time-dependent recommendation: specialist review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: Skeletally immature patients may need longitudinal growth and physeal surveillance beyond apparent injury healing.

metadata.sourceNote: Pediatric growth/remodeling pathway: specialist review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

claims.claimText: When evidence and surgeon preferences permit multiple safe pathways, document uncertainty and use shared decision-making.

metadata.sourceNote: Human review required. Population, fixation construct, procedure type, and clinical context must be recorded; preserve surgeon variability.

decisionPoints.trigger: Patient reaches planned clinical, imaging, and functional criteria for loading progression
decisionPoints.action: Confirm construct/procedure constraints and advance loading with explicit protection and regression instructions

decisionPoints.trigger: Pain, swelling, function, or imaging fails to follow the expected trajectory
decisionPoints.action: Pause progression and reassess diagnosis, adherence, construct, biology, infection, and rehabilitation plan

decisionPoints.trigger: Persistent drainage, dehiscence, spreading erythema, systemic symptoms, or rapidly increasing pain
decisionPoints.action: Arrange urgent examination and infection workup; escalate for source control when indicated

decisionPoints.trigger: New motor/sensory deficit, loss of perfusion, uncontrolled pain, or compartment concern
decisionPoints.action: Remove external constriction as appropriate and obtain immediate surgical evaluation

decisionPoints.trigger: Serial assessment shows inadequate fracture-healing progression
decisionPoints.action: Evaluate mechanics, biology, infection, medications, nutrition, nicotine exposure, and construct before intervention

decisionPoints.trigger: Migration, breakage, loss of alignment, or symptomatic prominence is detected
decisionPoints.action: Protect the reconstruction and obtain attending review for observation, revision, or removal

decisionPoints.trigger: Patient requests return to work, sport, or unrestricted activity
decisionPoints.action: Compare objective milestones and task demands, discuss residual risk, and document shared decision

decisionPoints.trigger: Planned prophylaxis duration is reached or bleeding/thrombotic risk changes
decisionPoints.action: Reassess patient, procedure, mobility, and competing risks before stopping or extending prophylaxis

decisionPoints.trigger: Growth asymmetry, angular change, length discrepancy, or physeal bar is suspected
decisionPoints.action: Obtain longitudinal measurements and pediatric orthopaedic review for remaining-growth strategy

decisionPoints.trigger: New neurologic deficit, bowel/bladder change, or rapidly worsening axial/radicular symptoms
decisionPoints.action: Initiate urgent spine evaluation and appropriate imaging
